title: Persona Metrics — run.json manifest
description: One file per stage write. Captures audit + reproducibility metadata: run id, prompt versions, model versions, source artifact hash, output paths, status, runtime warnings.

run_id.description: uuid4. New run_id generated at every stage invocation.

prompt_version.description: Either findings-emit@N.N (at /spec-review, /plan, /check synthesis) or survival-classifier@N.N (at /plan, /check, /build Phase 0).

model_versions.description: Map of role → model id used in this run. E.g. {'reviewer-default': 'claude-opus-4-7', 'codex-adversary': 'codex'}.

artifact_hash.description: sha256 of the source artifact at run time. At /spec-review and /check, this is the source snapshot (source.spec.md / source.plan.md). At /plan, this is the freshly-synthesized plan.md (no source snapshot since plan.md is created, not revised).

created_at.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of run start.

output_paths.description: Repo-relative paths of files written by this run (e.g. ['spec-review/findings.jsonl', 'spec-review/participation.jsonl']).

status.description: ok = all output files written successfully. partial = some files written, some skipped (e.g., classifier_error rows in survival.jsonl but findings.jsonl/participation.jsonl ok). failed = write aborted (e.g., snapshot precondition failed: source artifact not git-tracked).

warnings.description: Runtime warnings (e.g. ['uncommitted-and-not-gitignored', 'context-overflow', 'codex-output-missing', 'invalid-slug', 'evidence-validator-demotion-rate-high']). Empty array if none.
